attacking_style: Not a primary attacker; functions as a support rider who can occasionally step into leadership roles when team leaders falter or on transitional stages where his diesel engine suits steady efforts.
team_tactics: Deployed as a protective domestique for GC leaders in high mountains, tasked with pacing and shielding until final climbs. Team relies on him for tempo control rather than explosive attacks.
terrain_preference: Steady-gradient climbs and time trials where his non-explosive but consistent power profile can be utilized. Struggles on steep, punchy finales requiring acceleration.
vulnerability: Explosive, steep finales in final kilometers of mountain stages where pure climbers attack. Gets dropped on critical GC stages when gradients spike (evidenced by 6km-to-go drop at Paris-Nice).
key_patterns: Functions primarily as mountain domestique for Jumbo-Visma GC leaders, not protected rider himself.
Can perform above classification in steady-state efforts like TTing despite not being specialist.
Dropped on steepest sections when elite GC riders accelerate in final kilometers.
form_trajectory: negative: progression from leading GT stages (2021 Giro) to being dropped early on critical climbs (2023 Paris-Nice) suggests declining competitive level
